# SG Bars

> Singapore's premier guide to cocktail bars, speakeasies, rooftop lounges, and award-winning nightlife — including Asia's 50 Best Bars.

SG Bars is a directory of Singapore bars with search, category filters, and detailed venue pages covering address, hours, contact details, and category (cocktail bar, speakeasy, rooftop, wine bar, nightclub, brewery, and more).

## Pages

- [Home](/): Featured bars, search, and the cocktail-preference questionnaire.
- [All Bars](/bars): Full directory of Singapore bars with category filters and pagination.

## Sitemap

- [XML sitemap](/sitemap.xml): Every public bar detail page (`/bars/:slug`).
